```python
# <complete ModelNew code>
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from torch.utils.cpp_extension import load_inline

# Define the custom CUDA kernel for ReLU activation with predicated execution
source = """
#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

__global__ void relu_kernel_predicated(const float* x, float* out, int size) {
    int idx = blockIdx.x * blockDim.x + threadIdx.x;
    if (idx < size) {
        float result = x[idx];
        int condition = result > 0.0f;
        result *= condition;
        out[idx] = result;
    }
}

torch::Tensor relu_cuda_predicated(torch::Tensor x) {
    auto size = x.numel();
    auto out = torch::zeros_like(x);

    const int block_size = 256;
    const int num_blocks = (size + block_size - 1) / block_size;

    relu_kernel_predicated<<<num_blocks, block_size>>>(x.data_ptr<float>(), out.data_ptr<float>(), size);

    return out;
}
"""

cpp_src = (
    "torch::Tensor relu_cuda_predicated(torch::Tensor x);"
)

# Compile the inline CUDA code for ReLU activation with predicated execution
relu_predicated = load_inline(
    name="relu_predicated",
    cpp_sources=cpp_src,
    cuda_sources=source,
    functions=["relu_cuda_predicated"],
    verbose=True,
    extra_cflags=[""],
    extra_ldflags=[""],
)


class ModelNew(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        super().__init__()
        self.relu_predicated = relu_predicated

    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        return self.relu_predicated.relu_cuda_predicated(x)
```
